BYAMBO BITANSHI 
Buuku wa kufunjishishamo Kikaonde wa baFomu 1 Temu 2 
Ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya katataka yaimena pa kwingijisha byaketekelwa kubiwa 
(competencebasedcurriculum) amo bafunda mobafwainwa kufunda kuuba ne kulenga bintu 
kwingijisha maana akatataka ne buyuke. Nanchi kwingijisha competence based (CBC) kwaleta 
lupimpu ne kuwamishako mfunjilo ya bafunda. Kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho kyayukishatu 
bulongo makatazho eya na mambo aluno lupimpu lwa mfujilo yakatataka. Onkao mambo, 
kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyanengezha ne kupana byakwingijisha pa kufunjisha pa kuuba amba 
kufunda kulumbulukenga bulongo. Ino ntendekelo ya mfunjishilo ya mu Kikaonde ya shikamana 
pa mizhilo ya buyuke (competence based) ayo itundaika kufunda pabyo tupitamo mu moba 
abumi bwetu. Nanchi byaketekelwa kubiwa nobe kumvwañana, ndangulukilo yazhika, maana 
akupwisha makatazho, kulanguluka na kusabaula, kwilangulukilako, kuyuka kwingijisha 
makopyunta ne intaneti ne busulu byo byaingijishiwa mu buuku wa Curriculum Framework. 
Kabiji ino mitwe-kache, yaketekelwa kubiwa bulongo mukweseka kukwasha kufikizha mfunjilo 
ya buyuke nangwa amba CBC. Abino byaimena pa kuteshako muchima ne kwimika bipimo 
byawama byaketekelwa kubiwa. Onkao mambo, naketekela namba kuno kufunda kwa 
kwingijisha CBC mu Kikaonde mu Fomu 1, kusa kukwashako kuwamisha, kwatanchikiwa mu 
mabuuku a mizhilo ya kyalo aavula nobe, mu bintu bikwasha ku lufunjisho kutwajijila 
(Education for sustainable development), kwa 2023 ne kwa Zambia Education Curriculum 
Framework kwesekana na lutangijilo lwa 2016, alo lubena kwamba pa byakonsheka kufikizhiwa 
lufunjisho kubena Zambia. Kunungapotu, uno buuku ubena kumwesha kwibikishako kwa 
kipamo kitala pa kufunda mu kupeezhezhako bafunjishi mu mfujishilo, kupana lutangijilo 
kupichila mu mingilo yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwa bafunda alo lwaimena pa kuuba byaketekelwa 
bulongo. Bino nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi batundaikwa kufikizha ino mfunjishilo kupichila 
mu kupesapesa ne kwingijisha maana akusomba kabiji ne kubikilapo maana akwabo pa byobya 
byashalapo pa kimye kyo babena kufunjisha. 
 
 
 Kelvin Mambwe    (Dr.) 
 
Permanent Secretary- Education Services

Ministry of Education 
 
 
 
 
 
 
LUSANCHILO 
.Uno buuku wa Fomu 1 mu Kikaonde walupulwa na bukwasho bwa bangikazhi baji mu kipamo 
kitala pa kufunda kabiji ne babuula kwingila mukino kipamo. Nanchi bantu umo umo ne bipamo 
biimena bevwangilemo ne kubika milanguluko pamo pa byakwingijisha buyuke (Competence 
Based Curriculum). Onkao mambo, kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho kyapana lusanchilo ku bonsetu 
bevwangilemo mukupana milangwe yabo ayo yakwashishe mu kunemba uno buuku wa Fomu1. 
mu Kikaonde. Mukupeezhako nasanchila bonse bamingilo ba ku Curriculum Development 
Centre, abo baingijile na ngovu mukumona amba ma syllabi anembewa ne kupwishiwa 
bulongo. 
Charles K. Ndkala, (Dr) 
Director of Curriculum Development 
Ministry of Education

NTENDEKELO 
Uno buuku wa Fomu 1 mu Kikaonde wanengezhiwa mujishinda ja kukumya, mukukebesha 
kukwasha bafunjishi kufikizha mfunjishilo bulongo mu ino mfunjilo (Curriculum) ya katataka. 
Auno buuku wa lutangijilo wanengezhiwa kwesekana na buyuke bwa 2023 Competence Based 
Curriculum Syllabus. Uno buuku wanembewa mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi kukonsha 
kufunjisha nangwa kwa kubuula mabuuku. Kabiji mu uno buuku babikamo byakwingijisha, 
mingilo, lweseko lwa bafunda kwesekana na kipimo ne nkebelo ya bafunda. 
Kipamo kitala pa kufunda kyayukishatu bulongo makatazho ajipo pa lupimpu lwa kutendeka 
kufunda kwingijisha buyuke bwa (Curriculum wa Competence Baesd). Nkebelo ya kwingijisha 
Competence Based Curriculum yaleta lupimpu mukuwamishako mfunjishilo. Kabiji uno buuku 
wamwesha patooka kwipana kwa kipimo kitala pa lufunjisho mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi 
kukonsha kufunjisha bulongo, kupichila mu lutangijilo, mingilo yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwaimena 
pa biketekelo bya buyuke (Competence Based Curriculum). Nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi 
batundaikwa kupesapesa ne kusomba pa kuuba amba bapwishe lukatazho pa kimye kyo bena 
kufunjisha. 
Onkao mambo, mingilo ne lweseko lwapanyiwa mukweseka kutundaika kwingila ne kulangluka 
kwazhika mu bafunda kabiji ne kukwatankanya mfunjilo ya bintu byapusana-pusana pa sukuulu. 
Bafunjishi batundaikwa kufunjisha kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda, kupesapesa, kwingijisha 
mashinda aitabizhiwa umvwe bekimona amba kyakila mukuwama. Kuno kupeezhako kwa mu 
mfunjishilo kusa kukwashako bafunda kunonkelamo nangwa bafuma mubuzhokoloke 
bwapusana-pusana. 
Nanchi kyamwekana Patoka amba uno buuku usa kukwashako bafunjishi kufunjisha mu ino 
mfunjilo ya katataka ya kwingijisha buyuke (Competence Based) mu kutundaika bafunda na 
maana akuyuka ne kwikala na byubilo byawama mu mfunjilo. 
BYAKWINGJISHA UNO BUUKU

Mingilo yanengezhiwa mu uno buuku yafwayinwa kufunjishiwa mu temu 1 mu Fomu1. Nanchi 
uno buuku bamwabanya mu bishina bibiji kabiji mu bino bishina muji bibese byapusana-pusana 
nobe, kwamba ne kuteleka, kutanga, byambo, nchikameno ne nembelo. Mu kunungapotu, uno 
buuku kechi ke lufunjisho ine. Mufunjishi watundaikwa kunengezha lufunjisho kufuma mu uno 
buuku saka akyangye kufunjisha. Monai amba mwatolamo mingilo mu bibese byapusana-
pusana apa bino mwanemba lufunjisho lwa pajuuba-pajuuba. 
Kimwesho, lufunjisho lwafwainwa kwikala na kwamba ne kuteleka, byambo, kutanga ne 
kunemba. Pa kunengezha lufunjisho, monai amba mwasalamo bintu ne mingilo yo musa 
kufunjisha bafunda mu byaketekelwa kubiwa. Nanchi kimo kimye lufunjisho lwakosha kwikala 
na byaketekelwa kubiwa kukila pakimo. Onkao mambo, obewa pamo nobe mufunjishi 
wafwainwa kumona kibese kibena kukebewa kutaiwapo kimye kyabaya. Kabiji yuka amba 
mingilo yonse yapanyiwa mu byaketekelwa kubiwa kechi yafwainwa kufunjishiwatu mu 
lufunjisho lumo ne, bino yafwainwa kufunjishiwa mu mafunjsho aavula. 
MASHINDA ASALWA KWINGIJISHA 
Kimye kyonse mufunjishi saka akyangye kufunjisha wafwainwa kumona mu syllabus wa fomu 1 
ne kumona mashinda obapana akufunjishilamo Litilicha. Kabiji Mufunjishi watundaikwa 
kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda.

Ndonda ya lufunjisho 
 Mufunjishi amone kuuba amba wabuula bafunda bya kwingijisha byambo bya fikilamo. 
 Mufunjishi Buula bafunda kutanga ne kumvwisha byambo bya panyiwa.

 Bafunda besambe pa byambo byapanyiwa ne kwibilumbulula. 
 Mufunjishi Buula bantangi ba bipanyi kupana  sawakya pa byobesamba. 
 Apa bino mufunjishi Buula bafunda kulenga bipelu kwingijisha byambo byapanyiwa.

(Bulumbuluzhi bwa byambo bya panyiwa) 
 Kizhipanyi ke muntu ye bachina kubulozhi

 Mofwe ke mwanamulume wazama bingi. 
 Kimbela ke mwana mukazhi mukulumpe.

 Kabandaulu ke kakyulu kacheche. 
 Nkungulu ke nzovu mulume mukatampe. 
 Mitanda ke kiila kya kujila muntu wafwa. 
 Masala ke muzhi wakala paviluka bantu. 
 Mwimbwa ke bwina mwikala banyama. 
 e) Panyuma ya kwisamba pa bulumbuluzhi bwa byambo, mufunjishi Buula bafunda kulenga

Twapichile pa masala a bankambo. 
  
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Byambo byapanyiwa byaingijishiwa 
bulongo mu bipelu.

MUTWE -2: NTANGILO YA ZHIKA 
Mutwe-Kache: Kutanga ne Kumvwisha 
  
Buyuke: Bafunda batange ne kumvwisha bulongo bibaaba byafuma mu ma apusana-
pusana. 
  
Ntendekelo 
Mu uno mutwe wa ntangilo yazhika, bafunda bafwainwa kwikala na buyuke bwa kutanga ne 
kumvwisha. 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho 
Byakuuba mufunjishi: 
 Buula bafunda kutanga jishimikila kapambala. 
 Epuzhe bafunda biji mu jishimikila. 
 Atundaike bafunda kwisamba pa byambo biji mu musombelo ufita. 
 Atangijile bafunda kutanga bibaaba. 
 Epuzhe mepuzho afikila mu kipimo kya bafunda.

 Apane mwingilo. 
  
Bafunda bobe bino: 
 Batange jishimikila ne kumvwisha. 
 Besambe pa mutwe wa jino jishimikila mu bipanyi. 
 Bambe byo bayukapo pa uno mutwe. 
 Bakumbule mepuzho onse o bapewa. 
  
Biñambañamba: 
 Kipabi 
 Choko 
 Bikaachi bya byambo 
  
Mwingilo wakuuba (a )  
   
Kutanga kibaaba: Bafunda batange uno mwinsambo ne kumvwisha.  
Mwinsambo 
 Bansongwalume babiji, panyuma ya kupwisha sukuulu, baikele na kwisamba pa mambo a 
kupimpulwa kwa lubesha ne bibena kumweka mu ntanda. 
Nsamushi:  
Wayuka amba kimye bansemi betu kyobajinga balumendo nobe  
 
 
 
 
atweba, lubesha wa ino ntanda wajinga bingi bulongo. Mvula yanokanga bingi  
 
 
bulongo. Kabiji bya kuja nabyo byaikalangatu sabwalala ne pa katele.  
  Kibaala:  
 Mbayi ee kine, kechi wabepa ine, bankambo bambulanga amba, muyoya   
 
 
myaka, nyama ne masabi byajinga bya kupantamotu. Kabiji mvula nayo   
 
 
yatendekanga mu Ntundwe kufika ne pakachi ka mwenzhi   
 
 
 
 
wa Mulombola. Kechi baikalangapo na lukatazho mu bino bimye ine. 
 Nsamushi:  
Mbai! Tuji na bankambo ba Jikapa Malisopo, angi twaya twipuzhe byo  
 
 
 
baikalanga mu yoya myaka. Mambo lelo bintu byapimpulwa. Twaya twipuzhe  
 
 
inge kyakuuba amba naabo bamwenengapo byo tubena kumona na mambo  
 
 
a kupimpulwa kwa lubesha mu ano moba. Angi twaya twibamone.

Nsamushi: 
Bepi bankambo bamo, ba Mundambo, ba Malisopo Jikapa, nangwa  
 
 
 
ba Kamboyi nyi?  
  Kabinga: 
Tusakumona ba Jikapa Malisopo. 
 Malisopo:  
Bankana bami, ehe. Myaka yetu yawamine. Mvula yanokanga nobe ya  
 
 
 
jikondaknya nsoke. Kabiji masabi nao ajingatu mikola yonse.  
  Kibaala:   
Nkambo ba Jikapa, anga kika kyalengela mvula kukatazha ano moba kabiji ne  
                   
kupimpulwa kwa lubesha? 
Ba Malisopo:  Bankana bami, kibena kulengela bibye ke na mambo a kutema bichi  
 
 
 
kupichila mu bunjimi bukatampe, kutema bichi na mambo a kusoka  
 
 
 
mashanga, ne mwela wasaufa ubena kufuma ku minkinyi ikatampe. 
Nsamushi: 
Mmmm! nkambo, byokabyotu nyi? Nangwa kuji ne bikwabo? 
Ba Malisopo: Byavulatu bankana bami. Ano moba kafulumende ne bantangi ba kisemwa  
 
 
babena kupana ntanda yabaya bingi ku ba kañenda. Abano bantu batema bichi  
 
 
kufika ku maekita 500. Kabiji ne mitundu ikwabo ilama bañombe bavula   
 
 
kyakine kukila mu kipimo, nabo balengela kutamisha mushiji. 
   Kibaala:     Nkambo kine, sabai pakanyo ka mambo pakuuba’mba tuyukishe bulongo. 
   Ba Malisopo: Ibyo nkansami, kabiji bikwabo ke kulenga, nangwa kuubaisha kwa  
 
 
 
 
 
mataunyi. Usakutana amba mpuzha ipanyiwa nayo ibaisha, kabiji bichi  
 
 
 
byavula bitemewa kya kine-kine. Kikwabo ke bunjimi bwa bañenda bamo.  
 
 
Abano  bantu  ntemeno yabo ya bichi yatama bingi. Batema mpuzha yabaya  
 
 
bingi kyakuuba amba basoka mizhazhi pakuuba amba bichi byonse  
 
 
 
bizhiye. Kyapelako ke kusoka jisaka. Abino ne bikwabotu byo twabula  
 
 
 
kutongola bilengela lubesha kupimpulwa. 
  Nsamushi:  Ehe kine nkambo, byo mwa amba bishinka. Twimusanchila pa byonse byo  
 
 
mwabalaula. Yehoba emubikileko moba pakuuba tufunjilengako byavula. 
   Kibaala:  
Nkambo kine, mwalumbulula nzolo kijoma.

 Mwingilo wakuuba (b ) 
 Bafunda banembe ngipipishilo ya kibaaba pa bilengela mvula kubula kunoka. 
 Byakuuba Mufunjishi 
  Mufunjishi obe bino: 
 Ayuke kuuba amba ajino jishimikila bafunda bejiyuka kala. 
 Buula bafunda amba ngipipishilo iji pabiji. 
 Atongole lupusano lwa ino ngipipishilo ibiji. 
 Apane kimwesho kya ngipipishilo yapusana pakuuba amba bafunda bekale na milangwe 
yafwainwa. 
 Buula bafunda amba kishinte kya ngipipishilo ke kuyuka jipuzho byo jibena kwambapo.

Jishimikila 1 
When I was young,I partly lived on the copperbelt as well as in the North western of 
Zambia.I was born in Kitwe,Chamboli TownShip in Wasakile Mine Hospital.After a 
good number of years on the Copperbelt,My parents retired and re-located to 
Kasempa in Nkenyauna.Life on the Copperbelt was so precious,we lived in an 
electrified house.In kasempa,we used lamps and candles.But this did not surpass the 
kind of enjoyment I attained while in the village.Nkenyauna was an elite  place.It was 
full of elite families who equally got retired from elsewere. 
However, what got me intertained most was, whenever we went to play football by 
the ground, we always received un expected visitor. And this was a Kalulu.It would 
enter the pitch and disturb everyone. we would all want to catch it but using its trick 
movements, many people would be left crawling and eating the the grass. Anyway 
such never happened on the copperbelt. 
  
Jishimikila 2 
Lonajinga mwanyike, naikeleko kopabeuti ne kuka beta ka muzhika. Na semekelwe 
mukipatela kya wusakile mu Chamboli Kitwe.Pakupita myaka, bansemi balekele 
nkito ne kuya kukasempa ku nkenyauna. Ngikelo ya kukyalo kya mukuuba wamine 
kya kine. twaikalanga mu am Zubo amalaiti, ku kasempa twaingijishangatu koloboi. 
Nangwa byonkabyo, bwikalo bwa kukasempa bwa wamine kukilapo. Nkenyauna 
yajinga mpuzha ya shinkuka kabiji yajinga na bisemi byafunda bya fumine ma 
penshoni. 
Mino bintu bya nsekeshanga bingi kumuchima byajinga bya kuuba amba, inge twaya 
muku teya mpila mu kibanza, jonse twa tambulwilanga mwenyi wajizhina ja kalulu, 
inge katwela mu kibanza, bonse ponkapo, kekuuba kwi kakwata. Nambo 
akujimukisha, kashanga bantu babena kukalaba ne kuja nsono. Abye byabujilepo 
mumpuzha yamikochi.

NZOVU NE BANKASANJI 
Byaubile bantu, kwajingapo mwana Mfumu umo, wamukazhi; kamwale walambile bingi. Kabiji 
bafundabalume bamulwijilenga bingi mukuuba amba bamusongole. 
Bamfumu bapaine mukambizho wakuuba’ mba, “Ukasongola mwanami, kana yenkawa wakosa 
kumaalwa, ubula kupendwa, kwisukwila nangwa kwinyina inge watoma maalwa, nangwa 
kafwankelu ine.” 
Mwane nzovu ne bankasanji bepumine mutukuji amba bakabekye muntomeno ya maalwa ne 
kumona ukashinda, apa akasongole yewa kamwale. Bano bankasa nzovu bajinga: Kilangwa, 
Kyovwe, Mbo-o, Nsefu, Mfumbo, Ntengu, Nkonzhi, Mbazhi, Nsebula Ngulungu, Kasha, 
Kiñomba ne Kalulu. 
Bano bonse baile ku kipango kya Mfumu na kubekya. Mwane ba Mfumu bebapele pakulaala po 
balaajile kikungubulo.

Pakukya lukeelo, bebapele mema akowa ne nsongezho. Juuba ja Lesa najo ne kubandatu ine, ke 
chaile. Mwane kwaletwa mashima na tuzolo-ntanda tobateekele bulongo ku banteki bayukisha 
mwingilo wa kuteeka. Mwane baubiletu, iji mujiiso iji mu moona. 
Papichiletu kakimye kacheche, mwanene, kwiluleta bibaya bya maalwa. Nzovu ne bankasanji, 
baubiletu tome-e!  bapwishishenga kutoma ano malwa mabanga ene. Nangwa byonkabyo, 
kafwako wapendelwe nangwa kwisukwila ne. Kino kyazhingijishe Nzovu bingi. 
Nzovu walangulukile kweseka bankasanji na kisela kya tuntuluzhi. Watuntulwile masukula anji 
mu bankasanji. Yaya, bankasanji ke batampiletu kuya na kusukula aye mwine kasa aikalatu 
pamo kwakubula kwisunkumya. 
Byo paubile ke pafite-fite, bebaletejile mikeka amba balaalepo ne mataate akwivweta. Pa 
kwibatajishisha bano bantu, kafwapo wapendelwe ine. Byo baponene mutulo tukatampe, Kalulu 
wabukile po alaajile ne kulangulukapo maana amo akulengela bakwabo amba benyine. Mu 
kujimuka kwanji, washikwile mashipwa amaalwa ne kushinga bakwabo bonse kumatako. 
Ale! Kiñomba byo apapukile patulo amba naji muntu ne kwate pa matako, witana kubamba 
winyina. Kubusha Kasha, ale! Naye kintu kimotu, winyina kupitaila pa kipimo. Kasha 
wabushishe Ngulungu, Ngulungu wabushishe Nsebula, Nsebula wabushishe Mbazhi, Mbazhi 
wabushishe Nkonzhi, Nkonzhi wabushishe Ntengu, Ntengu naye wabushishe Mfumbo, Mfumbo 
naye wabushishe Nsefu, Nsefu wabushishe Mbo-o, Mbo-o wabushishe Nsebula, Nsebula 
wabushishe Kyovwe, Kyovwe naye wabushishe Kilangwa, Kilangwa naye wabushishe Nzovu. 
Ale! Bonse kwiya kwitanatu benyina. 
Kumanyanshi juuba ja Lesa saka jikyangye kuseela, ano makalala onse etaileko kushakotu 
mukala wabo Kalulu. 
Lukeelo byo bwakile, banteki bakelejileko na kupana nsongezho, bapapulukileko lubilo pa 
kwibatambulwila kubwema bwatama bwafuminenga mu nzubo mwalajile ano makalala. Benyi 
baishile ku kuno kubekya, bakawiletu bwema ntanda-butunga. Bamfumu baipwizhe Kalulu, 
“Bakolojenu bayapi?” Kalulu wakumbwile amba, “Mwane maalwa omwitupele kesha-japita, 
ashinchile bingi. Bonse baji kwinyina. Kwesekana na malamuna omwitupele, bonse banyema. 
Yami yenka kitonzhi washalapo.” 
Kalulu watumbalele bingi kabiji wasongwele ne mwana Mfumu. Aka kashala aka kanyonga.

 Kutanga:    Mufunjishi ne bafunda batange Nchikameno 
Ba Kañamba baikelenga mu nyaunda ya Kanyankele mu mpunzha ya Mukunanshi. Ba Kañamba 
bajinga bingi na lukasha ne lwilu. 
Juuba jimo, mu ñondo wa Kapyantoto, baimene lwendo lwa kuya ku mukola na kutalatala pa 
mazhiba abo na mulanguluko wa kukeba masabi afwa kibilu mambo mu yeo mwaka kwapichile 
bingi mashi abaya. 
Mwane kumutunta kwa ano mazhiba, bichi bya makonkola ne mikusu byapiletu shau na 
mashika. 
Ba Kañamba bafikile ku mukunkula wa ba Jatwa, ine mwanene, kechi bamwenepo nangwa 
kamusenga ka mubi kafwile kibilu ine. Kino kyamwekele bino, mambo masabi onse afwile mu 
muvuba waba Jipolo. 
Kwendakotu pacheche, bamwene nkwashi watumbuka mu musapa. Basenselako ne kalubilo mu 
kumona pafumine uno nkwashi. Kutala bibye, nkwashi waja kibese kyabaya, kushakotu 
kibamvu. Ba Kañamba besovyatu ke bakaye kunshi ya mukolana kukeba onka ano masabi 
akibilu. Baendelekotu pacheche; namba batale, mikanga nayo yatumbuka mukampabila ya 
mukola. 
Pakufikapo, batainetu patwijile muntu kala kabiji pashajiletu tubipitu twajilenga mikanga. Ba 
Kañamba batwajijile na lwendo lwabo lwa kutalatala pa mazhiba. Namba batale 
mukimpelampela, pa kampabila ko batela amba Shindende, kasabushi kaswatuta. Kuya 
pokaswatukile, kutanapotu jitoto ja lukala jo batela amba ‘shipanyela’ nangwa amba ‘shipana’.   
Ba Kañamba mwane bekankiletu kuya mwaya mukola na kukeba pafwila masabi akibilu. Byo 
baendeleko pacheche, bamonatu kintu bwi-i, kyalaala. Nanchi palaala kipandwe wa kyovwe kasa 
abena koota mute. Bafikile pepi, ke kwipampansha amba kampe baji kusendapo ka mupenyi 
bachibeko ka musunyi pa jitako ja kyovwe bakabelele. Yaya, nanchi baji kusha. Mukwenu 
mwanamulume waluba byakutwa; ke kukulatu kuboko kwabo ku matako a kyovwe amba 
bayokele machima bakabelele. Mwanene, ba Kañamba ne ludenga zu-u na lwilu. 
Kyovwe kumvwatu kintu kyamutwela ku matako, wapapupa patulo, wafina mu matako, waswatu 
kaye ne kujizhiba etaye pa meema. Ba Kañamba bakankelwe kusopola kuboko mambo 
wafiineko kyakosa bingi. Kimye kya nyemenenga kyovwe ne ba Kañamba saka balondela 
panyuma mukoko wabo saka ajitu mu matako a kyovwe. 
Ba Kañamba balangulukile kunyukuta kyovwe mukwapa na kuboko kukwabo kwashajilepo. 
Kyovwe pa kuseka, ku matako kwakasuluka ne ku kuboko kwa ba Kañamba kwasopokamo. Ba

Kañamba bashalatu na kumyanga pa kanwa. Byo etuchile pa mema, wabwela wabijika amba, 
“Janga ilakata mambo lelo inge waowa akabale.” Ba Kañamba nabo babijika amba, “Kulaala kya 
musango yewa, ubena kutanta nshima ku mukele!” 
Pakubwela pa muzhi, ba Kañamba bashikwile katemo kabo, balenga ne lufinda kebaye ne kuya 
na kuubankula moma wabo. Bafumyamo maana obakangile akubelela na nshima ya kimpombo.

MUPULUPULU NE KALOLO 
Bakalolo betotele bingi mukijiji kya kuuba’ mba ba mupulupulu bamwene malwa ene apa katele. 
Ba mupulupulu bebachinyanga na ntonga ya kalolo.

Mwane baubangatu inge bakwata kateete, kalolo ke kwimba amba, “Mupulupulu mpepo kateete 
na kwasa ntonga”. Aye mupulupulu pa kumvwa bino, walangulukile amba ka kyela kasañana.  
Kino kyalengejile ba mupulupulu kupanangatu bateete kwi ba kalolo abo bene na kufwa ku 
nzala. 
Mwane ba mupulupulu batendekele kunyana na mambotu a nzala. Panyuma ya kuja bateete 
bavula, ba kalolo baumvwine bwendekete ne kulaala balaajile. Ba mupulupulu bakwata kateete 
kakwabo ko bamininetu kyalubilolubilo. 
Byo bamwene amba ba kalolo bakupukilwa mutulo twine, ba mupulupulu ke kuchinta ku ntonga 
ya ba kalolo. Popo bataine amba kechi yajinga ntonga ya kyela ine. Nanchi kajingatu ka kikoba. 
Byo bapapukile patulo, kumonatu mukimpelampela, ba mupulupulu kasa balama kateete ku 
muvumbo wabo. Olo! Ba kalolo ke kwimba’mba, “Mupulupulu mpepo kateete na kwasa 
ntonga.” 
Ba mupulupulu ke kwimba amba, “Nachinta chintako, nanchi kakikoba!” Kufuma popo ne 
bujileelo, ba mupulupulu kechi bapapo ba kalolo bateete ine. 
Aka kashala aka kanyonga.

Byakuuba bafunda: 
 Kupesapesa mu kibaaba mwaila bilumbuluzhi bya byambo.

MIKOCHI YA NGOLODE MU KASEMPA 
Mikochi ya ngolode mu Kasempa yaleta kantu. Balupupila ba ano mabwe abuneme, balukuka 
nyaunda ya Dengwe. Bamo bafuma ku kyalo kya Tanzania, Zimbabwe ne ku Democratic 
Republic wa Congo. Kununga pa bano, ne bamajelabu kufuma ku kijiji kya ku Mikochi. 
Bafunda basukuulu bafwainwe kunemba mpeso yamu 2024, bapupijile ku ino nyaunda na 
kwingila mingilo ya bulukokaula ku bapoteshi ne ku bapota ano mabwe abuneme. Bakwabo, 
kikatakata bansongwakazhi, bapainenga mibiji yabo ku bapoteshi ne bapota ano mabwe a 
ngolode ku bulaalelaale bwa maama nafwa. 
Kuno ku mpuzha kwavujile ne kisela kya kwivundumuna ne kwi-ipaya mu kusaka kwangata 
ngolode ku yewa wi-ituluka. Bantu bavula beipailenga bene na bene na mambo akusakisha bya 
bunonshi bifumina mu lupoto lwa ngolode. 
Masongola abavula, kulubaji lwa bainetu, azekentele na mambo akupeela ku matako (kumaulu) 
mu kusakisha kajilo kupitaila pabyo batambula ku bena kwabo. Kino kyaleta bumvu mambo ne 
bamo bena Kilishitu bezozola ne kupeela ku maulu, baongolokela mu bino bisela bya bunya ku 
meso a Lesa.

Kijiji kya Kasempa kibena kujila na mambo binkuna bya bafunda bacheche ne kupeepa bizhima 
kwananukilako. Kabiji mapuso ne bikola byabailako mu kijijij kyetu. Kipatela kya Mukinge kya 
kepelako na mambo akuvula kwa mapuso ne bikola bya pusana-pusana.

KIBESE 4: MULAKA-ZHILO 
Mutwe: Tusuñami 
Mutwe-kache: Mitundu ya Tusuñami 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha tusuñami 
Ntendekelo 
Kasuñami ke kyambo kingijishiwa mu kifulo kya kintu. Ke kyambo kingijishiwa mu kipelu mu 
kukepeshako kubweluluka pa kyambo. Kino kikwashako ntangi wa byanembewa kumvwisha 
bibena kwambiwa. Kuji tusuñami twavula, bino twasekako ke tuno: 
  Amiwa 
 Obewa/Anweba  
 Aye 
 Abo/Ao 
 Atweba 
Labijila:  Bino byambo kechi be binungankanya na bikwabo ine. Binembwa bunke apa bino 
bikwabo byalondelapo. 
    Mwingilo wakuuba: Kwisamba pa ndumbulwilo ne mingilo ya tusuñami. 
 Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Kusobolola mitundu ya tusuñami (Tusuñami twa-
buntu, tusuñami twa-tusontelo ne tusuñami twa-bwinakyo) 
a)  Tusuñami twa-buntu: Tuno tupingakena pa bintu-zhina bimenako muntu/bantu.

Kyakumwenako: 
i) Atweba kechi twa konsha bonse kwikala bitonzhi ine. 
ii) Amiwa naji kupota masanyi, bino ao afwapo.  
Kulumbulula: Mu byakumwenako byonse bibiji biji peulu, tusuñami tonse tusatu tuji mu 
bumutwe wa kipelu mambo tonse tusatu yo mitwe ya byubilo. 
b) Tusuñami twa-tusontelo: Tuno twimenako kintu-zhina kabiji twitubula kana tuji mubumo 
nangwa mubuvule ne kwitubula paji kintu, kana pepi nangwa paleepa (Kubikapotu ne kimye). 
  
Kimwesho: 
a) 
Ake ko kafukuta ko nashile kesha mu motoka. 
Kulumbulula: Ape, kampe ñambi wakwata nangwa ubena kutongola paji kafukuta kamo kaji 
peepi ne aye. 
b) 
 Kana na konsha kusenda abyo bipenyi? 
Kulumbulula: Ñambi kampe ubena kutongola nobe masanyi. Abino bintu biji mubuvule kabiji 
biji paleepa na ñambi. 
Ngipipisho ya kulumbulula tusuñami twa-tusontelo 
 
PEEPI 
PALEEPA 
BUMO 
Ake 
Aka  
BUVULE 
Abye /Atwe

c) 
Tusuñami twa-bwinakyo: Tuno twimenako nkitu-zhina kabiji twitubula mwine 
mwinakyo. 
Kimwesho:  
i)  Ao makasu etu. 
Kulumbulula: Kyambo “etu” kibena kwimenako mwanzo wa kintu-zhina “makasu” kabiji 
kibena kubula ntangi wa byanembwa amba “atweba” yetu benao. 
ii) Kana tulondele mikambizho yanjinyi inyi yabo?

Kulumbulula: Mu kino kimwesho, “yabo” ibena kwimenako kintu-zhina “mikambizho” kabiji 
kibena kubula ntangi wa byanembwa amba “abo” bo benayo. 
Byakuuba mufunjishi: 
Mufunjishi apane kino kipimo ku bafunda kyakuuba bunke bunke: 
Tongola muntundu wa tusuñami twanembwa na manembo ajita ne mingilo yato mu bino bipelu 
bya panwa kunshi: 
Kimye: Mamineti 10 
1. Kasha kalaala mu kimfutele kyako. 
2. Atweba, twamba mulaka wa baswa meema. 
3. Aka kaana kechi komvwa byo bekabula ku bansemi ine. 
4. Abye bipe byalajika bibi. Potaitu bikwabo. 
5. Twana twa mpuku ato inge twavula, tu kajanga bivwalo. 
6. Kambalaminwe, kamfina bingi ku munwe wami wapakachi. 
Byakuuba bafunda: Panyuma ya kupwisha mwingilo wa bunke bunke, bafunda 
bashilañane mikumbu yabo bene na bene.

KIBESE 5: ÑAMBILO YAZHIKA 
Mutwe: Mulaka wañambilo yazhika 
Mutwe-Kache: Bishimpi 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha Bishimpi

Mwingilo wakuuba 1: Kwisamba pa bishimpi ne mwa kwibingijisha 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kya ketekelwa kubiwa: Bilumbuluzhi ne ñingijishilo ya bishimpi 
bisambiwapo bulongo. 
Biñambañamba: Bikaachi paji bishimpi, Chati paji bishimpi ne bilumbuluzhi. 
Kalobo: Ñambilo ya bishimpi, isolola kipimo kya bushayuka bwa mulaka ku banteleki ne kwi 
obewa mwine. Bishimpi byayuka kuwamisha ñambilo ne ndembelo ya mulaka. 
Kimwesho: Mwalaala nkovu mwa papakana 
a) Kimye: Kino kishimpi kingijishiwa pa kimye kyo baketela muntu kwimisha, bino kumwekapo 
nangwa kasinshi ine. 
b) Kulumbulula:  Kukankalwa kwimisha nangwa kusemesha. 
“Bashanji Subeta, balundanenu ba Kipenze, basongwele kala Selai. Kumonatu ne kajila 
munzubone kine! Kwapya ka?” 
Bashanji Subeta bapuma lupi mukuboko ne kwamba amba, “Yaya, ba Kipenze, mwalaala nkovu 
mwapapakana.” 
Ino ñambilo ibena kumweshatu patoka amba uno shetu kechi usema ne. Apo kampe ne bulume 
bwa kusemesha ufwabo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba 2: Kutanchika bishimpi mwaila mingilo yabyo. 
Kimwesho:  
a) Bishimpi bya lutundaiko: Bafunda-bankazhi balonde maimba bakaja buki. 
b) Bishimpi bya lukokelo: Bazhonda mukoko wakosa kechi wanekena ine. 
c) Bishimpi bya kukwatankana/lumvwañano: Munwe umo kechi utoola lukuso ine. 
d) Bishimpi bya kunyanchijila bafunda-bakazhi: Mwana-mukazhi tuvwi twa kasha. 
e) Bishimpi bya kwiletela obewa mwine: Mwana inge wajijila nseso, muleke mwine eteete. 
Tongolapo bishimpi biji mu uno mutanchi: 
a) Bishimpi bya bulobo:

b) Bishimpi bya ndengulwilo 
c) Bishimpi bya byambo pa bikope 
d) Bishimpi bya lujimuno 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bishimpi bya tanchikiwa bulongo monka mwaila 
mingilo yabyo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba 3: Kusala/Kutongola bishimpi bingijishiwa mu bimye bya pusana-
pusana. 
Byakuuba mufunjishi: 
 Mufunjishi apaane ñambo ya fyamika ku bafunda. 
 Mufunjishi Kwasha mashinda apeela ku kumbwilamo mepuzho 
Byakuuba bafunda 
 Bafunda besambe bulongo mu bipanyi bishimpi byafikilamo muyoyo ñambo. 
 Bafunda bapaane mikumbu yabo ku bonse mu kalasi. 
Tongola bishimpi bya mwaila ino ñambilo: 
1. Bafunda bakisemi kimo inge baendela pamo na lusekelo, abya paji kyawama kyo basaka     
 
kumwenamo. (Bafunda bankazhi balonde maimba, bakaja buki) 
2. Kubula kumvwina bakulumpe kuleta makatazho. (Mwana  wabukolo wamenene myevu 
kujikoshi) 
3. Kechi kyawama kukatazha muntu walukokelo inge waswa kutamisha kwanjine. (Bazhonda 
mukoko wakosa kechi wanekena ine) 
4. Bubi bwa bansemi kimye kimo, buleta makatazho ku bafunda inge abo (bansemi) bafwa. 
(Kabwa waiba, washila bafunda mfika) 
5.  Muzhi kechi uzhiyatu yense ine. Pashala bamo bakumusangula kulutwe. (Pafwa bichi 
pashala mabula)

Kipimo kyañingijilo kya ketekelwa kubiwa: Bimye bya kwingijishishamo ñambilo ya

Kalobo: Bishimpi ke mulaka mwipi, bino uji ñambilo yazhika ya fyamika kuubBuula

Mulokazhi washikwa bena buko, bamuleka na tuvwi ku kibaki (jakete) pakufuma ku kyolonyi.

1. Papwila malunzhi paji byabola. 
2. Palwila banzovu, pamanamina nsono. 
3. Lubilo lwa mwanyike, kijoma kya mukulu. 
4. Kufwa nafwa, nkankalwe kubola? 
5. Ku mutwe wa mfumu kwazhila nkonyi, jiwijo bambamo. 
Byakuuba mufunjishi: Abike bafunda mu tubipanyi tuche-tuche besambepo bimye bya

KIBESE 6: NTUNTULWILO   
Mutwe-kache: Mashinda akutuntulwilamo. 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana akutuntulula bibaaba kufumya mu 
mulaka wa Kizungu kutwala mu mulaka wa Kikaonde nangwa kufumya mu Kikaonde kutwala 
mu Kizungu.

Mwingilo wakuuba A: Kutuntulula bibaaba kufumya mu Kizungu kutwala mu 
Kikaonde. 
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Mashinda apusana-pusana aingijishiwa mu 
kutuntulula kufuma mu mulaka umo kutwala mu mukwabo mulaka. 
Biñambañamba: Bikaachi bya mashimikizho, byanembwa mu manyuzi peepa, byanembwa mu 
magazini ne wa mufunjishi. 
Mwingilo wakuuba mufunjishi: 
 Buula bafunda kwingijisha mitundu ya ntulwilo yo bafunjile mu Temu 1 mwafikilamo 
bulongo. 
 Aswishe pantanshi bafunda kwingila bunke-bunke. 
 Buula bafunda kushilañena milanguluko yabo mu tubipanyi tuche-tuche. 
 Kwisambapo bulongo pa ntuntulwilo ya ingijishiwa mutu bipanyi twa tucheche. 
  
Ntuntulwilo kyo kika? Ke kwamba nangwa kunemba byambo kufuma mu mulaka umo kutwala 
mu mulaka mukwabo. 
Mufunjishi avululemo bafunda ano mashinda aku tuntulwilamo obafunjile mu Temu 1: 
Mashinda akutuntulwilamo 
1. Ntuntulwilo ya kupingishapo byambo: 
Kupingishapo kwa byambo mu uno mutundu wa ntuntulwilo wikalako inge kya katazha kulama 
ndodnda ya byambo mukipelu nangwa mu mukuku wa byambo. Kino kilengela kubika byambo 
mundonda yapusanako, bino ndumbulwilo ya kipelu kasa yalamwa bulongo. 
Kimwesho:

Mu ino ntuntulwilo, kyambo kimo kiji mu mulaka mutanshi, kilumbululwa mu mulaka wabubiji 
na byambo byavulako pakuuba amba ntuntulwilo yumvwanyike bulongo.

Mwingilo wakuuba B: Bafunda batuntulule kino kibaaba kufumya mu Kikaonde

Kabwa, ke kilelwa kimo mu banyama bavula kyayuka kwikala bulongo na bantu. Inge muntu

Kabwa uji bingi na bukwasho. Pa nzubo inge paiya kilwanyi nangwa muntu wabula

bangivi kimye kya mute nangwa kimye kya bufuku. Nanchi kabwa ke mulunda-na-muntu.

KIBESE A: KUTELEKA NE KWAMBA 
Ntendekelo  
Mu kino kibese kya minsambo tusa kushilañena minsambo pa mutwe imo yalamata ku bwikalo 
bwa bantu bwa pa juuba pa juuba. 
Mutwe: Minsambo 
Mutwe-kache: Kwisamba 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha mulaka wafikilamo mu kwisamba pa bintu byalamata ku bwikalo 
bwa bantu. 
Mwingilo 1 
Isambai pa mutwe wa mwa kulamina bulongo ndandanda yenu munyaunda mo mwikala.  Saka 
mukyangye kuuba uno mwingilo, tangai uno mwinsambo: 
Mutoloki: Mu uno mwinsambo, ba kitumba-fumo Mwaji, babena kwisamba na bena mizhi 
basatu pa mo bakonshesha kukepesheko bukitomi ne kupeela ku maulu kwavula mu 
bafundabakazhi munyaunda yabo. Mwinsambo uji bino:

Kitumba-fumo Mwaji:  
Bena mizhi, mwaitwa kuno kujilapa, mu kwisambapo kyakosa pa   
byubilo bibiji byatama kya kine-kine bibena kubiwa muno 
munyaunda yetu. 
Mutoloki:  
Bena mizhi bekatemamo ne kamulupi ‘popopo!’. Bainetu bajinga 
ku biina na kutwa mebele, batutamo ne mikunda “Welelele lwa!” 
Kitumba-fumo Mwaji: 
 Kitanshi kyo tusa kwisambapo, ke bukitomi bwapitaila mukipimo 
mu bafundabalume. Tube byepi pakuuba amba mutende mu 
mazubo ne munyaunda yetu ekalamo? 
Mwina muzhi Kyangeleka:  Mushingi ku bakitumba-fumo Mwaji ne bonse bena mizhi bapwila 
pano. Twayai twikisende na kusumininwa mambo nzenzekela mu 
kuuba bintu, kusakonauna byavula. Amiwa na languluka namba, 
aba bonse betumpa mu kisonso kya kutoma byabila lukeelo-kelotu, 
kije kya kujilapa kyafwainwa kumonatu jishinda jimo ja 
kwibakambwilamo pakuuba amba bafume ku kino kyubilo. 
Mwina muzhi Tolofwelo:  
Mushingi atwajijile ku bakitumba-fumo Mwaji, apa bino ne 
bakwetu bena mizhi (Bakopolako pacheche) bonse. Ke 
kwibasebesha misebo yalepa miseke makumi atanu pa muntu-pa 
muntu. 
Mwina muzhi Situlongu:  
Mushingi ku bakitumba-fumo Mwaji ne ku bonse bena mizhi. 
Naswa mulanguluko wa bena muzhi Tolofwelo wa kwibamanyika 
mu kuseba mashinda aviimba mu mizhi yetu pa buntunanwa. 
Pakuuba amba balengeshiwe bumvu ku bantu bonse. 
Kitumba-fumo Mwaji: 
Kyawama, tusa kwikajika uno mulanguluko wa kumanyi bino 
bitomi mu jonka jino jishinda. Pano twayai pamutwe wabubiji. 
Kupeela ku maulu kwa bainetu mukijiji, tube byepi? 
Mwina muzhi Tolofwelo:  
Mushingi atwajijile mwane ba kitumba-fumo. Kyubilo kya kupela 
kumaulu kyakatazha kwikilonda-londa, mambo kyubiwa mu 
mfishi bavula saka balaala. Kana mwalangulukapo byepi? 
Mwina muzhi Situlongu: 
Mushingi atwajijile mwane. Nangwa kyakatazha byonkabyo, 
tukanye bafunda babakazhi kwimanazhala ku mikwakwa inge 
kwafichisha. Inge kino kyubilo kya twajijila, ke kwisamba na 
balongo baabo kuchina bakafunjisha banyike bakikoma. 
Kitumba-fumo Mwaji:  
Nasanta bingi bena mizhi pa kuchocheka bulongo pa ano 
makatazho. Tusa kubika bipope mu mapunzha onse amaalwa ne 
konse kumwekela bino byubilo byatama.

Mutoloki: 
Pakupwisha minsambo, munembeshi watundaikilwe kunengezha 
bipope bya mikambizho ne malamuna akulondela mukijiji kya ba 
kitumba-fumo Mwaji. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Mutwe wapanyiwa mu kwisambapo, waubiwa 
mwafwainwa. 
Mwingilo 2: Kupana masawakya 
Mwingilo wakuuba mufunjishi: 
 Usa kupaana bichi paji minsambo. 
 Abike bafunda mubipanyi bya minsambo. 
 Apane mikambizho ya kulondela pa kwisamba. 
 Anungankanye milanguluko ya bafunda 
Byakuuba bafunda 
 Batange minsambo ya nembwa ne kumona buntangi bwasolokamo. 
 Kupana masawakya afuma mu minsambo.  
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Masawakya aminsambo apanwa mwaila ndonda. 
 
KIBESE B: KUTANGA

Kyakuuba 1: Kwisamba pa bilumbuluzhi bya byambo 
Kimwesho: 
 Buntunanwa:   
Kuuba kintu/bintu patooka.  
 Kimpela-mpela: 
Pa mpunzha pa bena kumwekana bulongo. 
 Kunzanza meso

 Kipasu  
 
Kwamba kwa kubula kufya muntu.  
 
 Kupela ku maulu 
Muntu ubula kumona wamulume/wamukazhi, kana walaala nanji.   
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Kwingijisha byambo kwesekana na kipimo kya 
lufundo.

Kibaaba 
Kyalo kulumbuluka, buntangi bwawama. Kino inge kyabulapo, kyalo kijila mu mashinda aavula. 
Onkao mambo, kyanema kumona konse kumbaji ibiji pakuuba amba mutende ekale mu kyalo.  
Twayai tumone pa buntangi bwawama byo buji. Butangi bwawama ke bobwa bwasalwa na bantu 
bene. 
Kununga pa bino, ntangi wawama ufwenya kipi-kipi na boatangijila ne kumvwa lukaji lwabo. 
Kechi kwitolwela kwalepa na bantu ine. 
Ntangi wawama, uleta bukomo mu kijiji kyanji nobe bipatela, masukuulu, minkinyi yakulenga 
bintu pamotu ne bisankanyi byavula. 
Kabiji buno buntangi, buleta bantu pamo kwa kubula kapatulula. Buno buntangi bwanemeka 
nsambu ne luusa lwa bantu munyaunda. 
Bundama-kyalo bwatama bonauna luusa lwa bantu. Bantu babula luusa mu kyalo, bajitu pamo 
nobe bazha baji na nkambo yabo washinta bingi. 
Kubula kulondela mizhilo ya Kyalo yaamba pa luusa lwa bantu, kokayukilo kabundama kyalo 
bwatama.  
Bantangi bakwabo batemwa kumanyika bantu kupichila mukutwala bantu pakazhima kwakubula 
mambo ine. Kapatulula nako na mambo abulume-kazhi kauba ne wo! kubula kwesakanya 
mubyubilo bya bangikazhi kwalengela kupusenamo kwa bantu.  
Kabiji kikwabo ke lukatazho lwa kukajilwa mema awama. Butuntulu bwa muntu bulumbuluka 
na mema awama. Mema bo bumi bwa muntu.  
Kubula pakulaala pa lumbuluka nangwa nzubo, kuno kumwesha buyanji kubekala-nzubo. 
Kununga pa bino, lukatazho lwa kubula bipatela byawama nalo lumwesha buntangi bwatama. 
MEPUZHO 
a) Kumbula ano mepuzho kwesekana na byowatanga: 
i. Lumbulula bulongo mwanemena mema ku bekala-nzubo. 
ii. Tongola bintu bibiji bisolola buntangi bwawama. 
iii. Ñanyi bintu byakonsha kulumbulula bulongo bulume-kazhi? 
b) Lumbulula mu kyepelo kimo, byubilo bimwesha buntangi bwatama.

c) Nemba ngipipisho ya kibaaba kyonse kiji peulu.

Kisemwa kya kusekelela ntongo kya tendekele ne ba mfumu ba kizela ba butane na busatu abo 
bajinga ba fumpa malangulusha mu mwaka wa 1982. Ba mfumu ba kizela bo bajinga batanshi 
kutendeka kino kisho kya kusekelela ntongo pa mafumu onse aji ku kabeta muzhika nangwa 
north western.Patanshitu kino kisela kyajiko ne kunyuma kimye kya mafumu akwabo ajipo mino 
kechi kwaji kupwila pamo nobe byo kiji mu yino myaka ya kulutwe ne.Ba mfumu ba 
kambizhanga bantu babo kunengezha bya kuja ne bya kutoma abyo byo baletanga pamo ne 
kusangalala mu kumwesha kusekelela bya nsomo byapya mu yeo mwaka 
  
Kino nanchi kufuma ku nyuma ba mfumu ba kizela ba kambizhanga bantu babo kumona amba 
pa kimye kyapya bya kuja mizhi ne mizhi bafwainwa kunengezha bya nsomo ne kwipaya 
manyama aavula ne kwita luonde lwa mu kijiji na kusangalala pamo. Kino kya konsheshe 
kutwajijila byonkabyo mino mu kupitapo myaka ba ndama kyalo ba Kenneth Kaunda ba mwene 
pa boonaushi bwajinga mu kwipaya ba nyama mungye kabiji ne mu kusakisha kuvimbila ba 
nyama balangulukile kulekesha kino kisela ne kuswisha ba mfumu ba kizela kuletanga bantu 
babo pamo ne kusangalala boonse mu kuleta mutende mu mpuunzha. 
  
Kisemwa kya mu ba mfumu ba kizela kala kyajinga amba ``Mutwe wa nzovu .mambo ba 
Kaonde bavula bajinga ba bibinda.Buno bubinda bwajinga bwa kwingijisha mingele,mata

amikanda akwipailako banyama bashinta noobe ba nzovu ma bookwe kabiji ne bakwabotu ba 
nyama ba kubelela nangwa kuja. Pa nyuma ya kufuma na kuuba bino nanchi kwaikalanga kuzha 
mutomboko kukila mutwe wa nzovu. Kabiji bya munda bya kuuba noobe muchima,machima ne 
bifu banengezhanga ne kwi bija ku ba mu kisemi kya ba mfumu. Kino kisela kyatwajijile 
kufikatu ne kimye kya kutambula bwana bwa bene {independence}pa nyuma ya kutambula 
bwana bwa bene ba ndama kyaalo be kimwene amba kyanema kukikizha ba nyama ba mungye 
kabiji ba kambizhe mafumu onse kumona amba basalapo jishinda jimo mwa kukailanga kisho 
kyabo. 
  
Na mambo akino ba mfumu ba mukumbi kizela 8 batendekele kusekelela kino kisela kya ntongo 
kabiji kwailenga moba mafumu akwabo aKikaonde amwenemo buneeme pa kisela kya ntongo 
kyaletele mukumbi kizela mu kijiji kyabo. Kepo ba mfumu ba kasempa bafukwile kutendeka 
kisela kya kisho kyabo kya nsomo,kechi bonkatu ne kabiji ne ba mfumu ba mukumbi baloli nabo 
batendekele kino kisho kya kuletanga bantu babo mukukeba kusangalelanga pamo,ne kino kisho 
kyabo ke kufukwila . 
  
Ntongo kuuba mfumu ba mukumbi kizela ya tendekele mu mwaka wa 1983 pa 26 kapyantoto. 
Bantu ne ba mfumu pobalangulukile bya kupimpula jizhina ja mutwe wa nzovu ke ntongo. 
Nanchi kyambo kya ntongo ke kisela kya Kikaonde kuuba mfumu ba kizela ku mufumbwe, kino 
kilumbulula kusomona kajo katanshi ne kwi kapesha ne kusanchila aye mwine shakapanga 
mwala kampala pa kunokesha mvula ne kumenesha bulongo bya kuja. Nanchi ba mfumu 
batwajijila ne mu kusanchila lesa amba akonshe kukikizha bantu babo mu kijiji ne kumona 
kuuba amba bantu boonse baikala mutende ne kukwatankana mu kutwala mpuunzha yabo 
palutwe. 
  
Kunyuma kusomona kwa kajo mu mizhi kwaikalangako pa mizhi ne mizhi pa mwaka kwa 
kubula mfumu kuja pa kajo katanshi ne bino bantu abo bo baikalanga batanshi. Kino kwayanga 
moba bantu be kimwene amba kechi kyawama kuja kajo katanshi kwa kubula kwikapesha ku 
mwine mwina ntanda ne,kino nanchi kyalengejile bantu ne ba mfumu kumvwanana ne kuswa 
kuuba amba kila mwaka bafwainwanga kwikala na kisela kya ntongo pafwainwa patanshi ba 
mfumu basomona kajo ne kwikapesha ne kupesha mushiji pa kumenesha kajo bulongo. 
  
Ntongo kuuba mfumu ba kizela yanema kyakine kine mambo kufuma ne ku kala mafumu onse 
atwajijila na kupwizha bantu babo pamo mu kusangalala, kabiji kechi byonkabyo ne ntongo 
yatwajijila mambo kwikala kufunjisha ba nsoongwakazhi ne ba nsoongwalume bya kisemwa ne 
bya kishakulu,kechi byonkabyotu ne ntongo na mambo akupwila pamo nanchi kwa 
kufunjishanga bya kulama ma nzubo,masongola,bya bubinda,kutema majimi apa bino ne bya 
kushinda balwanyi

Nyimbo ya kishakulu 
Ntanda saka yakiwama, kala bantu baimbanga nyimbo ya kipale itelwa luno amba nyimbo ya 
kishakulu. Nyimbo ya kishakulu ke nyimbo ya kisemwa yaimbanga bashakulu mwapichile 
bwikalo bwa Kaonde. Beimbanga pa kimye kya kunowa kajo kapya, kimye kya buswanyi, pa 
   mitanda kabiji ne pa kubelwisha bisungu.  
    Kabiji beimban8ga ne pa kimye kya maalwa a mutentamo ne pa kukunta bibalabala muntu           
waingila mwingilo waku2tema kitemi bulongo mu buko. Ino nyimbo beimbanga pa kuzha mazha   
nabiji machancha, makuuku, musekese, katembo ne akwabotu.  
Bino ne lunotu, mu mapunzha amo a  mu mizhi ne ku bipango bya mafumu, ino nyimbo ya 
kishakulu ibena kwimbiwa, kikatakata ko balama8 kisemwa kya bukaonde  nangwa kishakulu. 
Pano bino, na mambo a nyimbo ya mu ano moba kabiji ne bijimba byasampukamo lelo jino, 
nyimbo ya ku muzhi yatendeka kwikala masengo a kabwa, mambo kechi ibena kumvwanyika 
umvwanyika ine. Bavula lelo jino babena kwiyumvwinatu pa waileshi. 
Byonka byo kya ambiwa kala, nyimbo ya mu ano moba ke ya kupantamotu. Kabiji ino nyimbo 
yavwangamo, lumba, legge, lwapa ne jaivi. Ino nyimbo javula beimba na kuzha kya kutolauka 
ne kusontaika minwe nobe bakonye. Kabiji beimba na kwingijisha bijimba bya kizungu.  
Nangwa byonkabyo, ino nyimbo beitemwa bingi ku bakitwala, kabiji ne bakulumpe bamo, 
pakuuba bakulumpe bavula bamba amba iboba bingi mukose. Banyike bo bene beyumvwa 
munyimo. Inge baumvwa amba banyimbi batumbalala baiya kyubatu jiku bonse baundulukila 
konka. 
Pa kuzha nyimbo ya kishakulu, kikatakata pa mitanda ya kukisha, ba Kaonde bazhanga na 
baleesa nangwa amba mwanamulume nangwa mwanamukazhi ye basajila jimo kuuba amba 
bakazhe nanji. Benyinganga nangwa kwikashilamo bisapi nangwa bitenge na wamulume ne

wamukazhi bino kebazhe na kuzhokoloka mujilo. Kileta bingi kitambo pa kwibamona na kuzha 
bino.  
Javula bafundabalume bamo ne bafunda bakazhi baiyanga na bena kwabo ba mu masongola pa 
kuuba amba bakepesheko mukao ne makozhi a mu masongola. Pa kuuba ku bazhike ne 
bakatanda, abo besalanga mu lwabo kuuba amba bazhe na bakwabo babujile mu masongola. Ku 
bamo mu kuuba bino mwafumanga ne maluwo nangwa amba kwisongola. 
N8yimbo ya kishakulu yawamine mambo yafunjishanga, kujimuna, kupwanya bantu kabiji ne 
kubingisha ba8ntu. Kabiji yapananga ne kisangajimbwe ku banteleki. Kyakijile pa byonse ino 
nyimbo yapananga maana ku bantu. 
Nyimbo ya ano moba ayo kafwako ne bijimo bya kufunjisha ine. Banyike kechi bafunjilako 
byavula ine, mambo mwayulatu matuka ne kwendeleka bantu. Inge muntu bamuba kyatama 
nangwa kumuzhingijisha, uno muntu wakonsha kuya na kwimba lwimbo pa kuuba amba 
akosamike nangwa kutuka ba mobile byatama. Mu ino nyimbo, kimye kimo batuka ne 
bandamakyalo ne kwibakosamika pa byo babena kulama bantu mu ntanda. 
Kwambatu kine nyimbo ya kishakulu yawama kukila ya mu ano moba, mambo yafunjishanga 
banyike kunemeka bansemi, kufunjisha bya kwikala mu masongola ne bya kwikala ku buko. 
Kabiji ino nyimbo yafunjishanga ne bya kwikalatu bulongo na bantu bonse, kununga pa 
kutundaika bunjima, bubinda bukatampe ne kusonsola.

Nsombelo ya Kulumbulula 
Nsombelo ya kulumbulula inembewa na nkebelo ya kulumbulula muntu nangwa kintu. 
Kuji kulumbula kwa muntu, mpunzha, kintu, nyama ne bintu byubiwa. Pa kulumbula 
kwikala kwingijisha byambo bya tulumbuluzhi ne ndumbululo. Pano mu ino nsombelo 
bafunda basa kutalatu pa kulumbula bantu. Ino nsombelo kabiji ikebewa kwingijisha 
kalango konse katanu, ko kuuba amba kalango ka kumona, kumvwa na matwi, kukwata, 
ka kununkula ne ka kumvwa kutama nangwa kuwama. 
Bya Kulumbula Muntu: 
Ino nsombelo yavwangamo bino bishinka; 
Palagalafu 1: Ntendekelo-jizhina, masengo-matwi, myaka ya kusemwa, kyalo mo ekala, kulepa 
kwa kimye kyo wamuyuka, bupopweshi bwanji ne kipanyi kya bumulwila ntanda kyo atundaika. 
Palagalafu 2: Byo amweka (kipepule, kisusu), bulema, bukonye ne bikwabotu 
Palagalafu 3: Byo afunda ne nkito yo engila 
Palagalafu 4: Byubilo byanji byo bayuka bavula 
Palagalafu 5: Mpezho-Nemba milanguluko yobe kwesakan na byo wamuyuka (miteeto yanji 
nangwa mushingi ye aji naye na bantu. 
Bafunda:

 Bekale mu bilumbiji 
 Besambe pa nembelo ya nsombelo ya kulumbulula 
 Banembe nsombelo

byavwangiwa mu kunemba nsombelo ya kulumbulula

Mitwe ya kunembapo: 
Salaapo ne kunemba mutwe umo pa ino; 
a. Nemba nsombelo mo usakulumbulula muntu umo ye wayuka waya nkuwa. 
b. Lumbulula bimweka Pashita nangwa Eluda umo wa mu kipwilo yenu. 
c. Nemba nsombelo ulumbulule bimweka mufunjishi umo ye watemwa. 
Bipimo bya ñingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Kunemba bulongo nsombelo ya kulumbulula

Kimwesho:

In a small village, there was a eighth grade teacher named Mr adams. He wasn’t just any teacher; 
he had a way of making every student feel important, smart, and capable. 
One day a new student named Kisasa joined the class. He was shy, struggled with reading, and 
often sat quietly in the back. Other students were quick to notice his struggles, and some even 
teased him. But Mr Adams saw something special in Kisasa.  
Instead of scolding the class for teasing the boy, Mr Adams decided to teach them a lesson in 
kindness. The next day, he brought a small plant into the classroom. He placed it on his desk and 
asked, “What does this plant need to grow?” 
“Water” 
“Sunlight” 
“Good soil!” the student answered. 
“Exactly” Mr Adams said. “And what happens if we ignore it or say bad things to it?” 
“It might die,” a girl replied. 
Mr Adams nodded. “Now, think about Jane. He is new here, and just like this plant, he needs 
kindness and encouragement to grow.” The room fell silent. From that day on, they started 
helping Kisasa and reading with him. By the end of the year he was reading better and he 
became their best friend.

Busulu 
Busulu busemwa kufuma ku mulanguluko wa muntu umo nangwa babiji basaka kusangula 
bwikalo bwabo. Kabiji kechi bapelelatu pa kulanguluka mu milanguluko ne kwikileka ine, 
balangulukapo ne kintu kyo bakonsha kwitumpamo kyakonsha kwibaletela nsabo (mali) mu 
bwikalo bwabo. 
Kilobo ne mukoyo baji bansongwalume baikalanga mu mpunzha ya Mwasama. Bano 
bansongwalume kechi baile palepa mu kufunda kwabo ine, bino bajinga na milanguluko ya 
kumona mashinda mwakuwamishisha bwikalo bwabo bwa kulutwe. Mu mpunzha mo baikalanga 
kechi mwajipo bintu bya kuleta bukomo pa kyokya kimye ine. 
Mu yoya mpunzha mwajingatu byubilo bya bumbanzhi. Bansongwalume ne bansongwakazhi 
betumpile mu kutoma binyu bipendañana, kupepa bizhima ne kuzhiya myeo ya bakwabo mu 
lunkanankana. Bafundabalume bakulumpe ne bafundabakazhi nabo pamotu mu byubilo. 
Bachechetu balumbulukilemo. Bino byonse byalangejile buyanji mu mpuzha ne kubula kuya 
kulutwe. Nangwa byonkabyo, aye mpunzha yajinga na bintu byavula byafwainwe kwingijisha 
mu kukomesha mpunzha mu bumamya ne bukomo nobe tukola tupita mema mwaka yense, bantu 
bavula, ne tumikochi tuchetuche twashinkwilwe na ma chainizi. 
Nanchi na mambo a bino, Kilobo ne Mukoyo balangulukilepo kutatula busulu muyoya mpunzha 
kabiji besambile kyabaya bingi payewa mulanguluko wabo. Ne na mambo a kuuba bajingapo na 
buyuke bwa busulu na byo bafunjilepo kasa bakiji mu sukuulu, kibapelejile kutatula busulu. 
Byonkabyo bamba amba mulanguluko wawama kyo kishina paimena busulu, pano bino kuji 
bintu byavula byakutalapo kasa tukyangye kwalulula mulanguluko kwikala ke busulu bwakoma 
ne. Kilobo ne Mukoyo besambile pa bino byonse nobe bino; Ñanyi bintu byafwainwa 
kwingijisha pakuuba amba mufume kintu kikebewa ku bantu; mali anga akapotwanga kyokya 
kintu? Bantu bakapotanga inga pakuuba amba tukatanemo nsubo?  Kwepi ko twafwainwa 
kubikila busulu bwetu? Bantu banga bo tukatwezha nkito; Bananyi bakapotanga byo 
tukapoteshanga ne kya kupezhako. Nanchi nsabo yakutatula nayo tukeitana kwepi? 
Panyuma ya bino byonse balangulukile kutatula na mashamba a bishu, matemate, kanyenze, apa 
bino ne myenge ya misachi. Mambo bino byo bintu byakebewanga ku bantu pajuuba-pajuuba. 
Kabiji bya kwingijisha (makasu, tutemo) bajinga nabyo. Mema nao kechi ashupile ine, mushiji 
naye waji watutu. Nanchi bayukilekotu kupota nkunwa ne muchi wa kubika ku bishu. 
Nobe mukukopa kwajiso, Kilobo ne Mukoyo, bajimine ne kukusa bishu byabo ne kujimba 
myenge pamo. Abya bijimwa byaubile bingi bulongo. Kabiji muñondo umotu batatwile 
kupotesha bishu mu kyokya kijiji ne mapunzha a kipi na kipi. Ba ku Mikochi ne ku Boma 
bailenga na kukungula ne kuya na kupotolwesha. Buno busulu bwapimpwile bwikalo bwabo mu 
kimye kichechetu. Kabiji mali abo byo avujile bapotele ne motoka wa kimbayambaya kya

kwibakwasha mu nsendelo ya bijimwa byabo kutwala ku kisakanyi. Myenge yabo yavujisha 
batwajilenga ku Kasumbalesa. Bano basongwalume batwezhezhe ne bamingilo ba 
kwibakwashako kabiji bakufweta mali pañondo-pañondo. 
Na mambo a buno busulu, mpuzha ya Mwasama yapimpwilwe bwikalo bwa bantu bavula 
kufuma mu buyanji kabiji byubilo bya bumbazhi byailenga na kuzhiya mambo bansongwalume, 
bansongwakazhi ne bakulumpe bamo batatwile kwitumpa mu kupota ne kupotolwesha kwa bintu 
byapusana-pusana ne kutanamo mali a kwikwasha nao. Onkao mambo, mulangulako wa muntu 
umo nangwa babiji waletele bubile mu bantu ne bisemi byavula.

Mutwe-Kache: Kutanga 
Buyuke: Kutanga mashimikila a kipimo kyabo bafunda kufuma mu ma abanembi bapusana-
pusana kya kupelawizha. 
Mwingilo wakuuba: Kutanga bibaaba byapusana-pusana. 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho: 
Mufunjishi obe bino: 
 Tanga kyepelo na manono, kasa alondela tuchibawilo bulongo 
 Buula bafunda kutanga bibaaba mu ma abo a kutangamo na manono 
 Esekenye ntangilo ya ufunda umo-umo kulondela mizhilo yatangilo 
Mwingilo wa bafunda:

 Bafunda batange bibaaba byapusana-pusana ne kwiyowa pa kutanga 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bibaaba byapusana-pusana byatangiwa bulongo 
Mwingilo wakuuba mufunjishi. 
Ipuzha bafunda kwipipisha mashimikila o batanga mu bibaaba byapusana-pusana umo umo 
mukanwatu. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kya ketekelwa kubiwa: Ngipishilo ya byatangiwa yaubiwa mwafwainwa 
bulongotu

KIBESE C: KUNEMBA 
Mutwe: Nsombelo 
Mutwe-kache: Mashimikila  
Buyuke: Kunemba jishimikila pa busulu  
Ntendekelo: Mu kino kibese bafunda basa kuyuka byavula pa bya kuuba busulu  
Ndonda ya lufunjisho:  
Byakuuba mufunjishi 
 Buula bafunda misango ya nsombelo 
 Buula bafunda byo banemba nsombelo ya jishimikila 
 Buula bafunda banembe bulongo nsombelo 
  Kwasha bafunda kuyuka mwa kunembela nsombelo ya jishimikila nobe bino; 
 Buula bafunda banengezhe mutanchi wa bishinte bya nsombelo kabiji bengijishe bino 
byambo bya mepuzho. Nanyi? Kika? Kimye ka? Kwepi? Mambo ka? Mu ñanyi jishinda? 
 Buula bafunda banembe jishimikila ja byamwekele mu ndonda imo 
 Buula bafunda bengijishe kimye-ngubo kya lunyuma. 
 Buula bafunda bengijishe tununga-nunga nobe kitanshi-tanshi, kyalondelapo ne apa bino, 
mu kumwesha ndonda ya byamwekele. 
 Buula bafunda bengijishe ndumbululo ne tulumbuluzhi kulumbulwilamo bankaizhi ne 
mapuzha ne kwingijisha ñambilo ya nshikamika.

 Kubikamo ne nembenembe ya jishimikila  
 Mpezho ya jishimikila yafwainwa kwikala ya kuvulukanga kikupu. 
Mwingilo wakuuba bafunda. 
Nemba jishimikila pa kya bulanda kimo kyamwekejile musulu umo. 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyatekelwa kubiwa: Nsoombelo yanembewa mwafwainwa bulongo. 
Mpezho: Mufunjishi ambile bafunda kwambapo bimo byo bafunda, apa bino ne aye 
anungepo.

KIBESE D. MULAKAZHILO 
Mutwe: Byambo 
Mutwe-kache: kuubala  
Buyuke: Bafunda babale manambala kufuma ku kamo (1) kufika ku kiumbi kya biumbi kimo 
(1,000,000) 
Ntendekelo: 
Mu kino kibese, bafunda basa kufunda bya kuubala kufuma ku 1 (kamo) kufika ne ku 1000.000 
(biumbi bya biumbi kiumbi kimo) 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho:  
Mufunjishi obe bino: 
 Epuzhe bafunda kwambapo amo o bayuka mu Kikaonde 
 Alumbulule byo babala mu Kikaonde 
 Amweshe bya kubala mu Kikaonde  
Mbalo ke jishinda ja kubajilamo bintu kimo-kimo ne kufika pa nambala ya kintu kyapelako. 
Kimwesho:

Kimo, bibiji, bisatu, bina bitanu… 
kuubala mu Kkaonde kuila mu bintu bibena kukebewa kubalwa, nabiji; 
Muntu:  Muntu umo, bantu babiji 
Jisabi:  Jisabi jimo, masabi abiji 
Moona: Moona umo, myona ibiji 
Kyulu: Kyulu kimo, Byulu bibiji 
Kasha: Kasha kamo, tusha tubiji 
Onkao mambo, kyo tubajila na kutongola bintu bine mambo umvwe muntu waambatu amba 
“umo” mukwabo ye abena kubula kechi ayuke ñanyi kintu kyatongola mukwabo ne, mambo 
“umo” walumbulula byavula nobe, umo nyama, umo mwenge, umo tandakumbiji (tangatanga). 
Bino kuubala konse kutatula na “kamo”, apa bino ketuye na kubula amba “tubiji”, “tusaatu”, 
“tuna.” 
Pano tutale pa kuubala kwakutatula kufuma ku “1” kufika ku “1,000,000”. 
1= kamo 
2= tubiji 
3= tusatu 
4=tuna 
5= tutanu 
6=tutanu na kamo 
7= tutanu na tubiji 
8= tutanu na tusatu 
9= tutanu na tuna 
10= jikumi 
11= jikumi na kamo

12= jikumi na tubiji 
13= jikumi na tusatu 
14= jikumina tuna 
15= jikumi na tutanu 
16= jikumi tutanu na kamo 
17= jikumi tutanu na tubiji 
20= makumi abiji 
21=makumi abiji na kamo 
22= makumi abiji na tubiji 
25= makumi abiji na na tutanu 
28= makumi abiji na tutanu na tusatu 
30= makumi asatu 
31= makumi asatu na kamo 
40= makumi ana 
41= makumi ana na kamo 
42= makumi ana na tubiji 
43= makumi ana na tusatu 
50= makumi atanu 
51= makuni atanu na kamo 
60= makumi atanu na jimo 
61= makumi atanu na jimo na kamo 
70= makumi atanu na abiji 
75= makumi atanu na abiji na tutanu

80= makumi atanu na asatu 
100= kitota kimo 
101= kitota kimo na kamo 
110= kitota kimo ne jikumi jimo 
200= bitota bibiji 
500= bitota bitanu 
750= bitota bitanu na bibiji ne makumi atanu 
1000= kiumbi kimo 
1500= kiumbi kimo ne bitota bitanu 
1800= kiumbi kimo na bitota bitanu ne bisatu 
500,000= bitota bya biumbi bitanu 
1,000,000=kiumbi kya biumbi kimo 
Mwingilo wakuuba bafunda 
Bafunda banembe mu ma abo. 
1. Neemba ano manambala mu byambo 
(a) 1 
(b) 90 
(c) 450 
(d) 600 
(e) 1200 
(f) 1900 
2. Nemba bino byambo mu manambala 
(a) Bitota bya biumbi bisatu 
(b) Kitota kimo ne makumi atanu na ana 
(c) Makumi atanu na asatu na tutanu 
(d) Biumbi makumi atanu 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kya ketekelwa kubiwa:

Manambala kufuma ku kamo (1) ne kufika ku kiumbi kya biumbi kimo (1,000.000) byabalwa 
bulongotu. 
Mpezho: Mufunjishi Buula bafunda kwambapo bintu bino byo bafunda.

Mutwe 2 Ñambilo ya Nzhokelo 
Mutwe-kata: Bishimpi 
Buyuke: Kwingijisha bishimpi 
Ntendekelo: 
Mu kino kibaaba muji kufunda bya kulumbulula bishimpi ne mo bingijishiwa kwesakana na 
kimye ne mpuzha  
Biñamba-ñamba:  
 Kipabi 
 Mabuuku a bishimpi  
 Mabuuku a kufundamo 
 Bikaachi bya byambo 
Ndonda ya lufunjisho:  
Mufunjishi obe bino: 
- 
Buula bafunda kwisamba pa misango ya bishimpi 
- 
Panyuma ya kwisamba, bafunda bapanepo bifwanyikizho bya bishimpi ne kulumbulula 
kimye ne mpuzha mo bingijishiwa. 
Kimwesho: 
 Kinyema kulu muchima munda wikiyuka 
 Munda mu kyabu mufuma ne bilema 
 Kechi bakila jiwi ine, bakila mwandalo 
 Kanwa kalobejile mutwe.

Mwingilo wa kuuba: 
Bafunda na bukwasho bwa mufunjishi balumbulule mwatala bishimpi byapanyiwa 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: 
Ndumbulwilo ne ñingijishilo ya bishimpi ya bisambiwa bulongo. 
Mwingilo wakuuba 2 
Mufunjishi alumbwile bafunda mashinda ene asatu ba Kaonde o bengijishamo bishimpi mu 
ñambilo yabo. 
 Kwingijisha bishimpi ke kayukilo ka maana 
 Kwingijisha bishimpi munambilo kulambisha mulaka 
Mu bishimpi muji mafunde a mubwikalo bafunda bayuke amba mu bishimpi muntu 
bakoonsha kumujimuna, kumwendeleka, kumuchibila mambo, kumu tundaika nangwa kumu 
bingisha. 
Kimwesho: 
Kumujimuna 
 Mukwenda mukunanga, Malubukilo ku musanza 
Kumwendelela 
 Lukala kyasemena mulunga 
Kumuchibila mambo 
 Bazhonda mukoko wakosa kechi wanekena ine 
 Nsezhi nsezhi wajile bujiji bwanji 
Kumutundaika 
 Kyafumapo kyafwa meso 
 Bana bankazhi balonde maimba bakaja buuki 
 Pakinkila nkulo pa mwaba lukelo ukabuka 
Kubinjisha 
 Kiwele iya tumutana mu jizhiba 
 Muunda mu kyabu. 
Bafunda babike bishimpi mwaila mingilo yabyo ne kulumbulula mo byatala. 
Kimwesho: 
- 
Kishimpi: Ponda boobe bwami nja bwa mapa 
- 
Mwingilo: Kujimuna 
 Mokyatala: Bamba mambo obe kechi a mukwenu ine

Mwingilo 
1. Kanwa kalobelejile mutwe 
2. Mwalala nkovu mwapapakana 
3. Wazha na nsezhi mukwapa 
4. Lesa upa wimazhala 
5. Muyi wa meema kavundamine mujilo 
6. Bwanga bukolela maanyi 
Kipimo kyañingijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bishimpi ne miingilo yabyo byalumbululwa 
bulongo. 
Bafunda basobolole bishimpi byafwainwa kwingijishiwa mu bimye bimo byapusanapusana 
nobe bino: 
- 
Walaala mu jito kechi umvwa nchokoloko ine (bikingijisha pa kimye kya masongola pa 
kufundañana) 
- 
Pa kwabanya bintu nangwa manyi paji bakulumpe (kaja mukulu keaba). 
Kipimo kyaningijilo kyaketekewa kubiwa 
Bishimpi byasobololwa kwingijishiwa mu bimye byabyo byaubiwa bulongo. 
Mwingilo: Bafunda basobolole bimye ne mpuzha mwa kwingijisha bino bishimpi. 
Kipimo kyaningijilo kyaketekelwa kubiwa: Bimye ne mapuzha mwa kwingijishisha 
bishimpi bya sobololwa bulongo. 
Mpezho: Mufunjishi Buula bafunda kwambapo bimo byo bafunda pa bishimpi.

KIBESE E: NTUNTULWILO 
Mutwe-kata: Ntuntulwilo 
Mutwe kache: Mashinda a kutuntulwilamo

Kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana akutuntulwilamo kutwala mu Kizungu nangwa 
kufumya mu Kizungu kutwala mu Kikaonde. 
Ntendekelo: Mu kino kibese bafunda basakuyuka bya kutuntulula kibaaba kwingijisha 
mashinda apusanapusana.  
Ndonda ya lufunjisho: 
Mufunjishi obe bino:  
 Patanshi afunjishe mwa kutuntulwila kufuma mu mulaka umo wa Kizungu kutwala 
mu mukwabo wa Kikaonde 
 Mufunjishi afunjishe misango ya ntuntulwilo 
 Kwasha bafunda kupichila mu bya kumwenako kwingijisha mashinda afikilamo 
bulongo. 
Kutuntulula ke jishinda ja kutuntulwilamo byaambiwa ne byanembewa kufuma mu 
mulaka umo ne kutwala mu mulaka mukwabo. Ino yo misango ya kutuntulwilamo; 
a. Ntuntulwilo ya pakyambo-pakyambo: Ino ke kutuntulula mulaka umo kutwala mu 
mulaka mukwabo pa kyambo pa kyambo kwa kubula kunungako kyambo kikwabo ine. 
Kimwesho: Nji na busulu (Kikaonde) 
I have a business (English) 
I am with business (English) 
Kizungu kine kyalumbuluka ke: I have a business. 
b. Ntuntulwilo ya kupingakenyapo kintu pa kyambo kyabulapo imo apa pabujijila. 
Kimwesho: Kwingijisha mutwe, maboko nangwa bintu bikwabo mu kupezhako 
ndumbulwilo nabiji kupukunya mutwe mu kumwesha kukana. 
c. Ntuntulwilo ya kusenga byambo mu yeo mulaka mukwabo. Kubujijila kwa byambo mu 
mulaka umo, kulengela kusenga byambo mu yeo mulaka ne kwibizelula. 
Kimwesho: 
(i) Maini (Kikaonde) from Mines ( English) 
(ii) Foloko (Kikaonde) from folk (English) 
(iii) Pensulu (Kikaonde) from pencil (English) 
d. Ntuntulwilo ya kulumbulula byambo. Ino yubiwa mu kulumbulula akya kyambo 
kyaingijishiwa mu mulaka, kabiji kyabula mu mulaka mukwabo. 
Kimwesho: 
(1) 
Malaria (English)                   - Lembazhala (Kikaonde) 
(2) 
Tsetse fly (English)                - Kazembe (Kikaonde) 
(3) 
Dysentry (English)                 - Kupolomya mashi (Kikaonde) 
Biñambañamba:  
 Bikaachi paji byambo

  wa mufunjishi 
 
 
Bafunda batuntulule kibaaba kufumya mu Kizungu kutwala mu Kikaonde kabiji ne kufumya mu 
Kikaonde kutwala mu Kizungu kwingijisha mashinda apusana-pusana a kutuntulwilamo. 
(Ntuntulwilo ya kyambo pa kyambo, yakupingakenyapo, kusenga, kuzelula byambo, ya 
kulumbulula ne ya kukumpankanya pa kutuntulula.) 
Mwingilo 
Mufunjishi apane mwingilo kwesekanya na misango ya ntuntulwilo yapanwa: 
a. Tuntulula kino kibaaba kufumya mu Kizungu kutwala mu Kikaonde pa kyambo pa 
kyambo. 
Entrepreneurship is about doing business. It is about changing an idea into activity that 
brings in an income. However, it is not good thinking that all you need is an idea. There 
so many things one will need to get into a business. Getting into a business with this idea 
will make someone become a rich entrepreneur. 
  
Kipimo kyaningijilo yaketekelwa kubiwa: Mashinda antuntulwilo aingijishiwa 
bulongotu. 
  
Mpezho: Mufunjishi Buula bafunda kwamba byo bafunda mu kino kibese, apa bino ne 
aye naye anungepo bikwabo.
